sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: Students can see real-time available 1-hour slots per teacher. Slots occupied by other bookings are greyed out or hidden. Only Mon/Wed/Fri slots appear.
sys_app_requirement.description: Users (students) can view available 1-hour lesson slots on the calendar based on teacher availability. Availability is calculated in real time by checking existing lesson records against the 3-teacher capacity limit (max 3 concurrent bookings per slot).
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-002: Slot Selection & Availability Display
